task.summary:
Merge branch 'hotfix/WSC-9-code-optimization' into feature/WSC-4-all-new-features-branche
# Conflicts: # .idea/workspace.xml # public/js/element.js
'delete' for simple inputs implemented, also now with 'stop stop' 'stop' can be typed
new selector for inputs without type added
options for fuzzy for vocs keyword
keyword extracting added for better search result
vocs now can still waiting for user command after saying vocs
added vocs ui html and styling
ui api: new api control methods implemented
ui api: bug fix for status text change
ui api: automatic start on page reload on session
ui api: added visualization for sounds
ui api: fixed some responsive issues
ui api: fixed more responsive issues
ui api: minimization option in storage
ui api: reload option saved in local storage
ui api: handle not supported browsers

MESSAGE.value: vocs now can still waiting for user command after saying vocs
added vocs ui html and styling
ui api: new api control methods implemented
ui api: bug fix for status text change
ui api: automatic start on page reload on session
ui api: added visualization for sounds
ui api: fixed some responsive issues
ui api: fixed more responsive issues
ui api: minimization option in storage
ui api: reload option saved in local storage
ui api: handle not supported browsers
